title: Section 236A
content: 1[236A. Laying of rules before State Legislature.-- Every rule made by the State Government under section 223 and section 236 shall be laid, as soon as it is made, before the State Legislature.
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 20 of 1983, s. 2 and the Schedule (w.e.f. 15-3-1984).
